summary: Metallurgical & Materials Engineering graduate (VNIT Nagpur) with hands-on experience in mechanical testing, SEM-based fractography, digital image correlation, and additive manufacturing. Comfortable moving between the lab bench and a Python analysis pipeline. Looking for roles in materials R&D, failure analysis, semiconductor materials, or advanced manufacturing.
